# KOFENOT‚ĄĘ

KOFENOT‚ĄĘ is a pocket-flat laptop wedge that lifts a laptop at the hinge for spill deflection and improved posture. It is 1 oz, flat-folding, travel-ready, and uses no magnets, clips, or adhesives.

## Site Structure

- Home: consumer sales page for the $15 retail KOFENOT hanging pack.
- Wholesale: for coffee shops, coworking spaces, gift shops, and retailers that want to resell KOFENOT.
- Custom: for businesses, events, conferences, coffee shops, coworking spaces, promotional product companies, IT teams, corporate gifting buyers, and brand programs that want custom logo printing.
- Story: founder story and press release for media, buyers, agencies, and partners.
- Spec: product details, patent and trademark notes, and downloadable technical information.

## Key Facts

- Product: pocket-size laptop wedge / laptop stand.
- Main use: lifts a laptop at the hinge for spill deflection and improved posture.
- Retail price: $15.
- Weight: 1 oz.
- Form: flat-folding and travel-ready.
- Attachment: no magnets, clips, or adhesives.
- Compatibility: laptops, tablets, and phones.
- Business uses: custom logo programs, corporate gifts, promotional products, IT team gifts, event giveaways, coffee shop resale, coworking resale, and wholesale retail programs.
- Business location: California-based.
- IP status: patent- and trademark-protected.
- Open Graph image: https://kofenot.com/kofenot-corp.jpg

## Important URLs

- Homepage: https://kofenot.com/
- Wholesale: https://kofenot.com/wholesale
- Custom: https://kofenot.com/custom
